execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    print("")
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut token = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when None
        i = i + 1
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          if not string.is_empty(token)
            if first
              out = "#{token} #{token}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{token} #{token}"
            end
            token = ""
          end
        else
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      if first
        out = "#{token} #{token}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{token} #{token}"
      end
    end
    print(out)
  end
end
